canonical_definition: The Moral Foundations Twitter Corpus, a dataset of 32,218 tweets annotated for moral dimensions across sociopolitical and cultural contexts including Black Lives Matter and the 2016 US presidential election.
papers: Around the World in 24 Hours: ProbingLLMKnowledge of Time and Place
InSerter: Speech Instruction Following with Unsupervised Interleaved Pre-training
